extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: for proceedings against the group, I counted the criminal rows for the Company (1), Promoter (3), Directors (1), and Subsidiaries (Nil), while excluding all corresponding 'By' rows; regulatory counts are the statutory/regulatory rows against the Company (10), Promoter (16), Directors (10), and Subsidiaries (1), and tax counts include only the Company (4) and Subsidiaries (3), excluding promoter/director tax matters. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is taken from their respective 'Against' rows: ₹422.29 million plus ₹10.09 million = ₹432.38 million, or ₹43.238 crore; promoter and director amounts and all 'By' rows are excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated Total of ₹317.43 million as at March 31, 2023, converted to ₹31.743 crore, rather than re-summed. The section provides no company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage; the disclosed percentages concern project types or construction costs, not customers. The source currency unit is ₹ million, converted to crore using 1 crore = ₹10 million.
